# PetCalCentral
> Free, science-based pet health calculators and feeding guides for dogs and cats.

## Core Tools
- [Dog Calorie Calculator](https://petcalcentral.com/tools/dog-calorie-calculator.html)
- [Cat Calorie Calculator](https://petcalcentral.com/tools/cat-calorie-calculator.html)
- [Dog Age Calculator](https://petcalcentral.com/tools/dog-age-calculator.html)
- [Pet BMI Calculator](https://petcalcentral.com/tools/pet-bmi-calculator.html)
- [Pet Water Intake Calculator](https://petcalcentral.com/tools/pet-water-intake-calculator.html)

## Guides
- [My Cat Is Fat](https://petcalcentral.com/blog/my-cat-is-fat.html)
- [Raising Gus](https://petcalcentral.com/blog/puppy-feeding-guide.html)
- [Gus Got an Ear Infection](https://petcalcentral.com/blog/gus-ear-infection.html)
